import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{getYoutubeThumbnailUrls}from'../utils/youtubeUtils';/**
 * YouTube Thumbnail Component with automatic fallback
 * Tries maxresdefault → sddefault → hqdefault → mqdefault → default
 */import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const YoutubeThumbnail=_ref=>{let{videoId,alt='',className='',style={},onLoad,onError,...props}=_ref;const[currentUrl,setCurrentUrl]=useState(null);const[loaded,setLoaded]=useState(false);useEffect(()=>{if(!videoId)return;const urls=getYoutubeThumbnailUrls(videoId);let currentIndex=0;const tryNextUrl=()=>{if(currentIndex>=urls.length){// All URLs failed, use the last one as fallback
setCurrentUrl(urls[urls.length-1]);return;}setCurrentUrl(urls[currentIndex]);currentIndex++;};// Start with the highest quality
tryNextUrl();},[videoId]);const handleImageError=()=>{if(!videoId)return;const urls=getYoutubeThumbnailUrls(videoId);const currentIndex=urls.indexOf(currentUrl);if(currentIndex<urls.length-1){// Try the next lower quality
setCurrentUrl(urls[currentIndex+1]);}// If we're at the last URL, it stays as is (default quality always works)
};const handleImageLoad=()=>{setLoaded(true);onLoad===null||onLoad===void 0?void 0:onLoad();};if(!currentUrl){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:`bg-gray-800 flex items-center justify-center ${className}`,style:style,...props,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"text-gray-400 text-sm",children:"Loading..."})});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:currentUrl,alt:alt,className:className,style:{...style,transition:'opacity 0.3s ease',opacity:loaded?1:0.7},onLoad:handleImageLoad,onError:handleImageError,loading:"lazy",...props});};export default YoutubeThumbnail;
